data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encryption of data at rest and in transit to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption standard utilized for data protection.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent audits and vulnerability assessments to maintain security posture.
data.technical_spec: Quarterly penetration testing and use of automated security tools such as Nessus.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Implements MFA to enhance security for user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Integration with services like Duo Security for an additional authentication layer.

data.title: Threat Intelligence
data.description: Utilizes threat intelligence to preemptively counter cyber threats.
data.technical_spec: Collaboration with industry threat intelligence platforms for real-time threat data.

data.title: Security Incident Response
data.description: Robust mechanisms to detect, respond to security incidents efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Incident response handled using tools like Splunk and ServiceNow.
